items.question: Do seaplanes really not fly at night?
items.answer: Correct — seaplanes operate on visual flight rules and only fly during daylight hours. If your flight lands late, we'll route you through a speedboat-accessible property or arrange an overnight stay near the airport.

items.question: How much luggage can I bring on each transfer type?
items.answer: Seaplanes and domestic flights have stricter weight limits than boats — typically in the 20–30kg range per person. We'll confirm exact limits for your specific transfer before you pack.

items.question: What happens if my international flight is delayed?
items.answer: We monitor your flight and rebook your transfer where possible. This is exactly the kind of thing that's easier with a booked-through agent than a self-arranged transfer.

items.question: Is the transfer really included in your total price?
items.answer: Yes — whichever type your trip needs, it's shown as one line in your all-in quote, pre-arranged and pre-paid so you're not negotiating with anyone on arrival.
